title: Recursive object whose cycle closes via an array property
description: type ObjectType = {a: string; deep?: {b: string; c: number}; d?: ObjectType[]} — same dependency-call mechanism as the basic circular interface; the array property d?: ObjectType[] closes the cycle via Array → Object.
notes: The recursive `d` property is optional, so `{a: "hello"}` (no children) is valid; nested children are validated recursively to whatever depth the value supplies.
pureType:
type ObjectType = {a: string; deep?: {b: string; c: number}; d?: ObjectType[]};
return createValidate<ObjectType>();
